---
title: "Mary Christiana Boyle"
---

## Mary Christiana Boyle

**Dates:** (1826/7-1907)

**Maiden name:** (Robins)

### Biography

wife (since 1861) of the Dean of Salisbury, the Very Rev. George David Boyle (1828-1901).

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st 1891

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
